name: @estebanforge/pi-codegraph-enhanced
description_en: Pi-native CodeGraph tools with startup auto-indexing. Fork of @vndv/pi-codegraph that adds automatic index init/resync on every session start: creates the index when missing, incrementally syncs drift, rebuilds on corruption, and skips cleanly when anothe
description_zh: Pi 原生 CodeGraph 工具，具有启动自动索引。从 @vndv/pi-codegraph 分叉，添加每个会话启动时的自动索引初始化/重新同步：缺失时创建索引，增量同步漂移，损坏时重建，另一个进程干净跳过时跳过
